languages.text: [Нацелить на Изимонда оружие] "Сделаешь еще один шаг — и умрешь".
[Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."
languages.original_text: [Нацелить на Изимонда оружие] "Сделаешь еще один шаг — и умрешь".

traits.locale_text: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."

languages.text: [Apuntar a Sauerback con tu arma] «Un paso más y está muerto».
languages.original_text: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."

traits.locale_text: [Apuntar a Sauerback con tu arma] «Un paso más y está muerto».

languages.text: 【将武器对准苏尔贝克】“再往前一步——你就死。”
languages.original_text: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."

traits.locale_text: 【将武器对准苏尔贝克】“再往前一步——你就死。”

languages.text: [Braquer votre arme sur Sauerback] « Un pas de plus et vous êtes mort. »
languages.original_text: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."

traits.locale_text: [Braquer votre arme sur Sauerback] « Un pas de plus et vous êtes mort. »

languages.text: [Silahını Sauerback'e doğrult] "Bir adım daha atarsan ölürsün."
languages.original_text: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."

traits.locale_text: [Silahını Sauerback'e doğrult] "Bir adım daha atarsan ölürsün."

languages.text: [Deine Waffe auf Sauerback richten] "Noch ein Schritt ... und Ihr sterbt."
languages.original_text: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."

languages.text: [武器をサウアーバックに向ける] 「もう一歩近寄ったら、お前は死ぬ」
languages.original_text: [Aim your weapon at Sauerback] "Take one more step — and you die."
